description: 数値を指定した桁で丸める操作を指します。金額や平均値を見やすい桁に揃えて表示するときによく使われます。

example_natural.english: Round the price to two decimal places.
example_natural.japanese: 価格を小数第2位で四捨五入してください。

example_programming.body:
SELECT product_id,
  ROUND(price, 2) AS rounded_price
FROM products
ORDER BY product_id;

Dim price As Double = 19.656
Dim rounded As Double = Math.Round(price, 2)
Debug.Print(rounded)
